hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); PATH_VAL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$PATH_VAL" | grep -q '^docs/' && echo 'CLAUDE.md rule: Need user approval before editing docs/' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE 'deleteDoc|deleteField|writeBatch.*delete|FieldValue\.delete|firestore.*\.delete\(' && echo 'CLAUDE.md rule: xóa Firestore document cần xác nhận user trước khi thực hiện' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "action['\"]?\s*:\s*['\"]?deleteNotes|action['\"]?\s*:\s*['\"]?deleteDecks|ankiconnect.*delete|/api/anki.*delete" && echo 'CLAUDE.md rule: xóa Anki notes/decks qua AnkiConnect cần xác nhận user trước khi thực hiện' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
echo '⚠️ REMINDER — Mandatory Workflow:'; sed -n '/## Mandatory Workflow/,/### Hard Rules/p' CLAUDE.md
